Description: Navigate from Login to Register page
Steps:
1. Load login page.
2. Click 'Register here' link.
Expected Result: App routes instantly to '/register' path, input form elements load cleanly.
Actual Result: App routes instantly to '/register' path, input form elements load cleanly.

Description: Citizen account registration - UI path
Steps:
1. Fill Name, Email, Password.
2. Click Register.
Expected Result: Success loading spinners, transitions user to Onboarding walkthrough.
Actual Result: Success loading spinners, transitions user to Onboarding walkthrough.

Description: Citizen sign-in authentication - UI path
Steps:
1. Fill Email, Password.
2. Click Login.

Actual Result: Redirects user to Citizen Dashboard feed. Displays welcome notification toast.

Description: Citizen sign-out - UI path
Steps:
1. Open Profile.
2. Tap 'Sign Out' button.
Expected Result: Dashboard layout fades out, returns user to Login page.
Actual Result: Dashboard layout fades out, returns user to Login page.

Description: Submit new complaint with photo upload - UI path
Steps:
1. Navigate to Report page.
2. Select category.
3. Type description.
4. Upload picture.
5. Click submit.
Expected Result: Displays submission uploading status bar, changes page to Complaints list feed on completion.
Actual Result: Displays submission uploading status bar, changes page to Complaints list feed on completion.

Steps: 1. Tap upvote button on issue card in list feed.

Actual Result: Button transitions to colored/active state, counter increments by 1 instantly with a micro-fade transition.

Description: Submit Citizen Rating and Feedback for resolved complaint
Steps:
1. Select resolved complaint.
2. Tap 5 stars.
3. Type feedback.
4. Click submit.
Expected Result: Closes rating dialog. Displays success toast. Reloads status details to 'Closed'.
Actual Result: Closes rating dialog. Displays success toast. Reloads status details to 'Closed'.

Actual Result: Changes assignee name on card. Officer contact details fade in.

Actual Result: Renders resolved badge status. Resolution thumbnail previews successfully.
